instruction: Create an item table for an RPG inventory. Each item needs a display name, description, max stack count, gold value, weight, and whether it is consumable.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Items
STRUCT: FItemData

COLUMN DisplayName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN MaxStack: Int = 1
COLUMN Value: Int = 0
COLUMN Weight: Float = 0.0
COLUMN IsConsumable: Bool = false

ROW HealthPotion: "Health Potion", "Restores 50 health", 10, 25, 0.5, true
ROW IronSword: "Iron Sword", "A sturdy blade", 1, 100, 5.0, false
ROW GoldCoin: "Gold Coin", "Currency", 999, 1, 0.01, false

instruction: Build a loot table for a fantasy game. Columns: item name (string), rarity (string with default Common), drop chance as a float between 0 and 1, and sell price as an integer. Include 5 items from common to legendary.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Loot
STRUCT: FLootEntry

COLUMN ItemName: String
COLUMN Rarity: String = "Common"
COLUMN DropChance: Float
COLUMN SellPrice: Int

ROW WoodSword: "Wood Sword", "Common", 0.5, 10
ROW IronArmor: "Iron Armor", "Uncommon", 0.25, 50
ROW MagicRing: "Magic Ring", "Rare", 0.1, 200
ROW DragonScale: "Dragon Scale", "Epic", 0.03, 500
ROW ExcaliburSword: "Excalibur", "Legendary", 0.005, 5000
actual_dsl:

STRUCT: FLootEntry

COLUMN ItemName: String

ROW IronArmor: "Iron Armor", "Uncommon", 0.25, 50
ROW MagicRing: "Magic Ring", "Rare", 0.1, 200
ROW DragonScale: "Dragon Scale", "Epic", 0.03, 500
ROW ExcaliburSword: "Excalibur", "Legendary", 0.005, 5000
raw_output:

instruction: Make a data table listing enemy types for a tower defense game. Each entry should have: the enemy name, health points as a float, movement speed as a float, armor rating as an integer, and a boolean for whether the enemy can fly.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_TDEnemies
STRUCT: FTDEnemyData

COLUMN EnemyName: String
COLUMN Health: Float
COLUMN Speed: Float
COLUMN Armor: Int = 0
COLUMN CanFly: Bool = false

ROW Runner: "Runner", 30.0, 500.0, 0, false
ROW Tank: "Tank", 200.0, 150.0, 5, false
ROW Flyer: "Flyer", 40.0, 400.0, 0, true
ROW Boss: "Boss", 1000.0, 100.0, 10, false

ROW Tank: "Tank", 200.0, 150.0, 5, false
ROW Flyer: "Flyer", 40.0, 400.0, 0, true

instruction: Create a skill table for an action RPG. Each skill needs: name, description, mana cost, cooldown in seconds, damage amount, and whether it is an area effect.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Skills
STRUCT: FSkillData

COLUMN SkillName: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN ManaCost: Float = 0.0
COLUMN Cooldown: Float = 1.0
COLUMN Damage: Float = 0.0
COLUMN IsAreaEffect: Bool = false

ROW Fireball: "Fireball", "Launches a ball of fire", 25.0, 3.0, 40.0, false
ROW IceStorm: "Ice Storm", "Freezes an area", 40.0, 8.0, 25.0, true
ROW Heal: "Heal", "Restores health", 30.0, 5.0, 0.0, false
ROW Lightning: "Lightning Bolt", "Strikes a single target", 35.0, 4.0, 60.0, false

instruction: Build a data table of character abilities. Columns: ability name (string), type (string, default Active), mana cost (float), cooldown (float), range (float, default 500), and healing amount (float, default 0). Include a mix of attack, heal, and buff abilities.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Abilities
STRUCT: FAbilityData

COLUMN AbilityName: String
COLUMN Type: String = "Active"
COLUMN ManaCost: Float
COLUMN Cooldown: Float
COLUMN Range: Float = 500.0
COLUMN Healing: Float = 0.0

ROW Slash: "Slash", "Active", 0.0, 1.0, 200.0, 0.0
ROW Fireball: "Fireball", "Active", 25.0, 3.0, 1000.0, 0.0
ROW Heal: "Heal", "Active", 30.0, 5.0, 0.0, 60.0
ROW Shield: "Shield", "Buff", 20.0, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0
ROW Dash: "Dash", "Movement", 10.0, 2.0, 500.0, 0.0

ROW Fireball: "Fireball", "Active", 25.0, 3.0, 1000.0, 0.0
ROW Heal: "Heal", "Active", 30.0, 5.0, 0.0, 60.0
ROW Shield: "Shield", "Buff", 20.0, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0
ROW Dash: "Dash", "Movement", 10.0, 2.0, 500.0, 0.0

instruction: Create a wave configuration table for a survival game. Each wave has: wave number, enemy type to spawn, number of enemies, and the time between spawns.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Waves
STRUCT: FWaveConfig

COLUMN WaveNumber: Int
COLUMN EnemyType: String
COLUMN EnemyCount: Int
COLUMN SpawnInterval: Float = 2.0

ROW Wave1: 1, "Goblin", 3, 3.0
ROW Wave2: 2, "Goblin", 5, 2.5
ROW Wave3: 3, "Skeleton", 3, 2.0
ROW Wave4: 4, "Goblin", 8, 1.5
ROW Wave5: 5, "Troll", 1, 0.0

instruction: Make a level progression table. Each row is a level with: level number (int), required XP to reach it (int), health bonus (float), damage bonus (float), and unlock name (string, what the player unlocks).
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Levels
STRUCT: FLevelData

COLUMN Level: Int
COLUMN RequiredXP: Int
COLUMN HealthBonus: Float = 0.0
COLUMN DamageBonus: Float = 0.0
COLUMN Unlock: String = ""

ROW Lv2: 2, 100, 10.0, 2.0, "Shotgun"
ROW Lv3: 3, 300, 20.0, 5.0, "Rifle"
ROW Lv4: 4, 600, 35.0, 8.0, "Grenade"

instruction: Create a dialogue data table. Each line has: speaker name, the dialogue text, how long to display it in seconds, and the row name of the next line to show.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Dialogue
STRUCT: FDialogueEntry

COLUMN Speaker: String
COLUMN Text: Text
COLUMN Duration: Float = 3.0
COLUMN NextRow: Name = ""

ROW Line1: "Guard", "Halt! Who goes there?", 2.5, "Line2"
ROW Line2: "Player", "Just a traveler.", 2.0, "Line3"
ROW Line3: "Guard", "The village is ahead. Be safe.", 3.0, ""

COLUMN DialogueText: Text
COLUMN Duration: Float = 3.0

instruction: Create a crafting recipe table. Each recipe has: the result item name, ingredient 1 name, ingredient 1 count, ingredient 2 name, ingredient 2 count, and crafting time in seconds.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Recipes
STRUCT: FRecipeData

COLUMN ResultItem: String
COLUMN Ingredient1: String
COLUMN Count1: Int
COLUMN Ingredient2: String = ""
COLUMN Count2: Int = 0
COLUMN CraftTime: Float = 1.0

ROW IronSword: "Iron Sword", "Iron Ore", 3, "Wood", 1, 5.0
ROW HealthPotion: "Health Potion", "Herb", 2, "Water", 1, 3.0
ROW Shield: "Iron Shield", "Iron Ore", 5, "Leather", 2, 8.0

instruction: Create a shop inventory data table. Each item has: display name, cost in gold (integer), category (string like Weapon or Armor), the item description, and stock count.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Shop
STRUCT: FShopItem

COLUMN DisplayName: String
COLUMN Cost: Int
COLUMN Category: String = "Misc"
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN Stock: Int = 99

ROW Sword: "Steel Sword", 150, "Weapon", "A sharp steel blade", 5
ROW Shield: "Oak Shield", 100, "Armor", "A sturdy wooden shield", 3
ROW Potion: "Health Potion", 25, "Consumable", "Restores 50 health", 20
ROW Arrow: "Iron Arrow", 2, "Ammo", "Standard iron arrows", 99
actual_dsl:

COLUMN DisplayName: String
COLUMN Cost: Int

instruction: Create a difficulty settings data table. Each row is a difficulty level with: name, enemy health multiplier (float), enemy damage multiplier (float), player health multiplier, XP multiplier, and whether friendly fire is on.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Difficulty
STRUCT: FDifficultySettings

COLUMN DifficultyName: String
COLUMN EnemyHealthMult: Float = 1.0
COLUMN EnemyDamageMult: Float = 1.0
COLUMN PlayerHealthMult: Float = 1.0
COLUMN XPMult: Float = 1.0
COLUMN FriendlyFire: Bool = false

ROW Easy: "Easy", 0.5, 0.5, 1.5, 1.5, false
ROW Normal: "Normal", 1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0, false
ROW Hard: "Hard", 1.5, 1.5, 0.8, 0.75, false
ROW Nightmare: "Nightmare", 2.0, 2.0, 0.5, 0.5, true

instruction: Build a data table for achievement definitions. Each achievement has: a unique name, display title, description text, the condition type as a string, the target value as an integer, and reward XP.
expected_dsl:
DATATABLE: DT_Achievements
STRUCT: FAchievementData

COLUMN AchievementName: String
COLUMN Title: String
COLUMN Description: Text
COLUMN ConditionType: String
COLUMN TargetValue: Int
COLUMN RewardXP: Int = 0

ROW FirstKill: "First Blood", "First Blood", "Defeat your first enemy", "EnemiesKilled", 1, 50
ROW Hunter: "Hunter", "Hunter", "Defeat 50 enemies", "EnemiesKilled", 50, 500
ROW Rich: "Wealthy", "Wealthy", "Collect 1000 gold", "GoldCollected", 1000, 200
ROW Explorer: "Explorer", "Explorer", "Discover all locations", "LocationsFound", 10, 1000
